SpaceSuit.title: Space suit
SpaceSuit.description: Part of an EVA (Extra-Vehicular Activity) suit; a helmet is also needed for full functionality. These suits have built in rebreathers which clean any waste gasses. Extremely uncomfortable to sleep in.

JumpSuit.title: Overalls
JumpSuit.description: Clothing that covers the top and bottom half of the body, usually to protect from dirt and grime.

FlakVest.title: Ballistic vest
FlakVest.description: A protective vest made using layers of aramid fibers. Designed to reduce the impact of projectiles.

Jacket.title: Jacket
Jacket.description: An item of clothing designed to cover the top half of the body.

DusterJacket.title: Duster jacket
DusterJacket.description: A longer jacket that covers almost the whole body.

Jeans.title: Jeans
Jeans.description: Comfortable clothing that covers the lower half of the body.

Shirt.title: Shirt
Shirt.description: Comfortable and light clothing that covers the upper half of the body.

CombatShirt.title: Combat shirt
CombatShirt.description: Tough clothing that covers the upper half of the body.
